purpose: Machine-readable catalog of existing WellFit agents/frameworks, ownership areas, registers, docs, validators, extension boundaries, protected boundaries, and next safe maintenance tasks. This catalog prevents duplicate architecture and helps future agents decide whether to extend an existing agent domain or propose a new agent first.

artifactStatus.meaning: Implementation maturity of the artifact. 'built' lifecycle status does not imply runtime autonomy.

executionCapability.meaning: Maximum currently documented execution capability; use report_only unless a human-approved runtime scope explicitly exists.

runtimeCapabilityFieldDefinitions.allowedWriteScopes: Path globs the artifact/task is allowed to write when a human-approved task grants write execution.
runtimeCapabilityFieldDefinitions.forbiddenWriteScopes: Path globs the artifact/task must not write; forbidden scopes override allowed scopes.
runtimeCapabilityFieldDefinitions.requiresHumanApprovalForRuntime: True when runtime execution, product writes, repairs, PR creation, or protected-scope actions need explicit human approval before use.

entries.name: Autopilot Dry Run
entries.purpose: Dry-run-only next-task orchestration that reads existing governance and reports safe task selection without writing files.
allowedExtensionTypes: source-of-truth and Work Map/TODO Index pointers
handoff/report output clarifications within the same domain
requiresNewAgentProposalFor: new durable agent role or owner outside this domain
new runtime authority or product behavior
protected/high-risk scope ownership
overlap across two or more existing agents without one clear owner
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes without a scoped approved task.

No token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, mission-completion-authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, compliance, Unity/PR #13, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.
Report-only governance by default; human review required for protected or high/critical scope.
entries.nextSafeMaintenanceTask: Keep register, documentation, Work Map, TODO Index, and report-only validation script references synchronized.

entries.name: Approved Agent Build Runner and Merge Gate

unrestricted auto-merge
unrestricted auto-repair
protected/runtime product changes
maxAgentsPerRun greater than 1

no PR approval or self-approval
no merge with missing checks
no deployment
no PR #13 or Unity changes
no token/NFT/wallet/payment/reward/mission-authority/health/child/location/privacy/legal/compliance changes
MERGE_READY=false is an expected report-only merge blocker and must not be treated as validator failure when GATE_CONFIGURATION_READY=true.
Missing required checks, unavailable GitHub checks, incomplete local evidence, and missing post-PR evidence still block actual merge readiness.
entries.nextSafeMaintenanceTask: Use the report-only merge-gate validator to keep GATE_CONFIGURATION_READY separate from concrete MERGE_READY evidence before any future controlled one-agent activation or merge review.
